title: 10 best herbal creams for dermatitis
description: Comfrey creams helps with dermatitis because of its unique composition, rich in allantoin, a natural anti-inflammatory agent. Allantoin soothes and calms irritated skin, reducing redness and discomfort associated with dermatitis. Additionally, comfrey's mucilages form a protective barrier on the skin's surface, locking in moisture and shielding from environmental stressors that can exacerbate the condition. This natural combination of properties makes comfrey creams an effective treatm...
